content.text:
I've opened the SupplierSummary layout area for you (you can switch the year using the toolbar to view 2024 or 2025). This view shows suppliers and their product coverage by category.

Would you like me to:
- Drill into a specific category and list its suppliers, or
- Open the ProductCategoryAnalysis view to see category-level supplier distribution, or
- Export a detailed mapping of suppliers → categories for the selected year?

Tell me which option you prefer.
